title: Kadavul Thantha Lyrics Maayavi
stanzas:

azhagiya vazhvu
ulagam muzhuvadhum
avanadhu veedu
kangal moodiye
vazhthu paadu

karunai pongum
ullangal undu
kanneer thudaikkum

innum vazhanum
nooru aandu

edhai naam
ingu kondu vanthom
edhai naan
angu kondu selvom

naamellaam swasikka
thani thani kaatru
kidaiyaathu
megangal megangal
idangalai pozhiyaadhu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kadavul Thantha?

The song conveys a motivational and uplifting message about life and gratitude.

Who are the singers of Kadavul Thantha?

The song is sung by Kalpana and SPB Charan.

Who composed the music for Maayavi?

The music for Maayavi was composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

What is the release year of the movie Maayavi?

The movie Maayavi was released in 2005.

What emotions does the song Kadavul Thantha evoke?

The song evokes feelings of motivation, gratitude, and positivity.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kadavul Thantha from the movie Maayavi is a motivational melody that emphasizes gratitude and the beauty of life. Sung by Kalpana and SPB Charan, the song's soothing tune is complemented by Devi Sri Prasad's uplifting composition. The lyrics by Palani Bharathi inspire listeners to appreciate the blessings in life and encourage a positive outlook. This song is perfect for moments of reflection and celebration, evoking a sense of peace and motivation.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the uplifting vibes of Kadavul Thantha from the movie Maayavi, where Kalpana and SPB Charan's harmonious vocals blend seamlessly with Devi Sri Prasad's melodious composition. This song, penned by Palani Bharathi, offers a soothing yet motivational experience. Dive into the world of Kadavul Thantha and let its inspiring lyrics elevate your spirits.
stanzaMeanings: The beautiful life given by God, the whole world is his home, close your eyes and sing praises.
There are hearts full of kindness, and hands to wipe away tears, we must live for a hundred years.
What did we bring here, what will I take there?
Oh beauty, let's live life with love and say goodbye.
On this earth, happiness will never end.
In life, I have no complaints.
As long as life is restless, we will keep moving forward.
When it's time to say goodbye, we will thank with a smile.
This excitement, this joy, will always live in our hearts.
We all can't breathe separate air, clouds don't rain in separate places.
Leaves fall today in winter, but spring will return tomorrow.
When spring returns, the cuckoos will sing again.
The end and the continuation, these are the lessons of life, listen.
The beautiful life given by God, the whole world is his home, close your eyes and sing praises.
